jobs.title: Head of Partnerships
jobs.snippet: The Head of Partnerships will be on a mission to leverage their past record of success launching and growing partner programs to build and sustain Deel's partner marketplace and sales partnerships as one of the very best.

jobs.title: VP - Partnerships & Alliances
jobs.snippet: ClauseMatch is an award-winning global Compliance Technology company with a unique AI-powered SaaS product offering for regulated firms including Banks, Investment Management, Payments and Insurance.

jobs.title: Vice President, Customer Success
jobs.snippet: Lead our global post-sales strategy, overseeing implementation, adoption, retention and customer experience functions worldwide.

topPicks.title: VP, Partnerships
topPicks.snippet: Reporting to the SVP, Customer Success and Partnerships you will manage our business plans for alliances and channel, develop close partner relationships, orchestrate cross-functional execution, and drive business success while managing the BD team.

industry.note: 🎯 Core domain: hr tech, background screening

topPicks.fullDescription: Jobs at Checkr Current openings at Checkr About Checkr Checkr builds people infrastructure for the future of work. We've designed a faster—and fairer—way to screen job seekers. Established in 2014, Checkr puts modern technology powered by machine learning in the hands of hiring teams, helping to hire great new people with an experience that’s fast, smooth, and safe. Checkr has over 100,000 customers including DoorDash, Coinbase, Lyft, Instacart, and Airtable. A career at Checkr means collaborating with brilliant minds, disrupting an industry, and opening channels of employment to often overlooked candidates. Checkr has been recognized as one of BuiltIn's 2023 Best Places to Work in the US and is a Y Combinator 2023 Breakthrough Company. Create a Job Alert Level-up your career by having opportunities at Checkr sent directly to your inbox.
